:mod:`CF10` --- Implementing dimensions for CF 1.0 compliant files
===================================================================

.. module:: slicing.cf10
   :synopsis: Implementing dimension classes which work on CF 1.0 files.

.. moduleauthor:: Claude Gibert <claude.gibert@synopticview.co.uk>
